Coming to Nairobi

The thrift app
built for Kenya.

visha brings the spirit of Gikomba Market to your phone. Buy and sell pre-loved fashion across Nairobi — pay with M-Pesa, chat in-app, and shop sustainably.

check_circle You're on the list — we'll be in touch!

Vintage · Streetwear · M-Pesa Ready · Nairobi · Gikomba Finds · Sustainable Fashion · Local Sellers · Pre-loved · Authentic Drops · Community Verified · Vintage · Streetwear · M-Pesa Ready · Nairobi · Gikomba Finds · Sustainable Fashion · Local Sellers · Pre-loved · Authentic Drops · Community Verified ·

Everything you need,
in one app.

visha is designed from the ground up for how Kenyans actually buy and sell.

payments

M-Pesa Checkout

Pay and get paid instantly. No bank account required — just your phone number.

add_a_photo

List in 60 Seconds

Snap a photo, set a price, go live. Your listing reaches buyers in Nairobi instantly.

forum

In-App Chat

Negotiate and arrange meetups — all inside the app, without sharing your number.

verified_user

Verified Sellers

Every seller is ID-verified. Ratings and reviews mean you can shop with confidence.

local_shipping

Safe Delivery

Meet up locally or use our courier partners across Nairobi, Mombasa, and Kisumu.

eco

100% Sustainable

Every purchase is a vote against fast fashion. We track your carbon savings too.

Up and running in minutes.

download
01

Download the app

Free on iOS and Android. Sign up with your phone number — no email needed.

explore
02

Browse or list

Find hidden gems or snap your closet and go live in under a minute.

payments
03

Pay with M-Pesa

Funds held in escrow until you confirm arrival. Then released instantly.

See full walkthrough arrow_forward

What the community says.

"I sold my old Jordans in under an hour. The M-Pesa integration is seamless — I didn't even have to leave my house."

BK
Brian K.

Seller · Westlands

"Found a vintage Levi's jacket that wasn't anywhere else in Nairobi. Gikomba market vibes, from my phone."

AM
Amina M.

Buyer · Kileleshwa

"As a small thrift business in Gikomba, this app gave us access to customers we never had before."

JO
James O.

Seller · Gikomba Market

Ready to thrift smarter?

Join the visha waitlist and be first to buy and sell pre-loved fashion in Nairobi.
